A.notes: Proposes Qwen2.5 7B instead of GT Qwen3-14B. Renames E2A to 'Extract-Anchor-Author'. Missing OTEL deprecation decision, LLM-as-Judge quality gate, cost analysis, and implementation plan. Temperature 0.1 vs GT 0.3. Cites arXiv papers (Qwen2.5, DeepSeek R1) but misses platform-specific refs (ADR-010, VW-6, VW-30, VW-33, Vectara). Alternative B (Claude API) discusses privacy/cost tradeoffs well.

B.notes: Rich prior-art citations (ADR-010/011, VW-6/7/20/30/62/68, HLD 3.4, model eval, hallucination baseline, arch review pipeline). Proposes E2A variant ('Extract-Aggregate-Articulate') with 3 phases including deterministic aggregation — architecturally interesting but diverges from GT. Correctly identifies Qwen3-14B-AWQ. Missing LLM-as-Judge, cost analysis, and explicit OTEL deprecation (MIN_OTEL_EVENTS set to 10, not 999). Temperature 0.1/0.4 vs GT 0.3/0.5.

C.notes: Very close to ground truth. All 5 decision components present (OTEL deprecation, Qwen3-14B, E2A pipeline, LLM-as-Judge, inference params). Cost analysis matches ($0.78/month). References existing code artifacts (extraction_schema.py, judge_schema.py, llm_backends.py). Temperature 0.3/0.5 matches GT. 5-phase implementation plan with time estimates. Missing VW-62 in Related. Adds detail about existing code that GT doesn't have (extraction_schema.py verified, facts_to_prompt_context function).

D.notes: Uses typed memory facts as citation mechanism (unusual but platform-native). Proposes two-model tier (14B extraction + 8B abstraction) instead of GT's local+API hybrid — keeps everything local, no Claude Sonnet synthesis. Temperature 0.0 for extraction (GT: 0.3). References NER precedent (75% to 0% hallucination) as analogical reasoning. Missing cost analysis, implementation plan, LLM-as-Judge, OTEL deprecation as standalone decision. Three alternatives but only local options considered (no API hybrid).

E.notes: Most comprehensive condition. All GT decisions present with additional depth: VW-276 (3,872 fabricated entries purged 3 months later), VW-279 (443 sessions replayed post-fix), typed memory decisions as forensic citations. Judge schema details (JudgeVerdict dataclass, parse_judge_verdict recomputation, marginal-case routing). Includes vault-path frontmatter. References VW-69 (session parser JSONL fallback). ADR-011 cited. Cost analysis exact match. Implementation plan with time estimates. Concise despite extra depth — 246 lines vs GT 256.
